FIELD.NAME: enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether linting is enabled for this question

FIELD.NAME: ai_enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether AI analysis is enabled for this question

FIELD.NAME: ai_principles
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated CQP principle numbers for AI to assess; NULL means all semantic principles

FIELD.NAME: disabled_checks
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated pylint checks to disable for this question

FIELD.NAME: min_severity
FIELD.COMMENT: Minimum severity override: convention, refactor, warning, error

FIELD.NAME: marks_enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether style check marks mode is enabled for this question

FIELD.NAME: marks_weight
FIELD.COMMENT: Mark weight for the injected style check test case

FIELD.NAME: original_allornothing
FIELD.COMMENT: Saved allornothing value from question_coderunner_options, restored when marks mode is disabled

TABLE.NAME: local_crcqp_lint_event
TABLE.COMMENT: Student CQP lint interaction events for research

FIELD.NAME: slot
FIELD.COMMENT: Question slot number in the quiz

FIELD.NAME: issuecount
FIELD.COMMENT: Total CQP issues found by client-side analyser

FIELD.NAME: resultsjson
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON: which CQP principles were violated and how many times

FIELD.NAME: code
FIELD.COMMENT: The student's submitted source code captured at this event, for research analysis

FIELD.NAME: airesponse
FIELD.COMMENT: Full AI analysis response payload (JSON); populated only on the ai event

FIELD.NAME: eventtype
FIELD.COMMENT: What triggered this row: button (student clicked Check Code Quality) or submit (quiz attempt submitted)
